page_metadata.biotools__summary: PySCF is an open-source collection of electronic structure modules powered by Python. The package aims to provide a simple, lightweight, and efficient platform for quantum chemistry calculations and methodology development.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: PySCF is an open-source collection of electronic structure modules powered by Python. The package aims to provide a simple, lightweight, and efficient platform for quantum chemistry calculations and methodology development.
